titleStmt.title: SII 5.1172: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1172. (A.R. No. 291 of 1896). ON THE SAME PILLAR, WEST AND SOUTH FACES.

summary.p: (Partly published in Epigraphia Indica, Vol. VI, p. 268).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīśakavatsarē śaradharātigmāṁśuśaṁkhyānvitē sītālakṣma
ṇasaṁggatasya sutanō rāmasya kū[¨r*]mmālayē . bhaktyā śrīnṛhari¨rmmuni
[¨rggu]ṇanidhiḥ kṛtvā pratiṣṭhāṁ śubhāṁ tatpūjādinimityakaṁ samadadā
tsva¨rṇnaṁ kṣamanirādhi . svasti śrī śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1215 gunēṁṭṭi mā
gha śukla paṁccamiyu ravivaramunayaṁddu . śrīmadānaṁddatī¨rtthapūjya
pādācā¨ryyaśiṣyulaina śrīnaraharitī¨rtthaśripādālu śrīku¨rmmanathuni
nagariyaṁddu śrīrāmanāthuniki sītāparamēśvarinni śrīlakṣmaṇadēvarannu pra
tiṣṭiṁcci vīrikini pūjāpuṣpamunaku śrīgaṁdhamunaku maḍapaṁḍlu
reṁṭṭiki Appalu Ēnuṁṭṭiki viḍyalu mūṁṭṭikiṁttavaṭṭu nityamai celu
ṭakunu śrīku¨rmmanāthuni śrībhaṁḍāramaṁddu peṭṭina gaṁḍamā 51 ṭṭiki ce
llaṁggalayadi Ī dha¨rmmuvu tiruvati śrīvaiṣṇavanāyakalu lōp£aina paṁccadha
la rakṣa(ḥ) . taṁbaruvāru vākalaśapāṇa 1 . Ī kalaśapāṇa 1 . muta 1 . kaḷapātra 1 . 0
gāUruvulu 4 . kaṁcutalya 1Ø kōra 1Ø guṁḍakuḍka 1 . cippalu 3 . dhupadhīpapātra
lu 2Ø Īghaṁṭṭa 1Ø Aṁṭṭyanya 1Øgā Uruvulu 10 paṭṭaØkappaḍālu maṁjiṣṭisīralu
vellasīraluṁgā Uruvulu 19 paṭṭutraḍu 1 baḍḍukhaṁḍa 1 . tarava
ralu 2 . 0 gā Īṁtavaṭṭu śrīrāmanādhuniki peṭṭiri . śatruṇāpi kṛtō dha
¨rmmaḥ pālanīyyaḥ prayatnataḥ . śatrurēva hi śatrusyāt dha¨rmmaśśatru¨rnna
kasya cit .
Digital edition of SII 5.1172 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
